summary: Completed testing of Admin Dashboard, Seller Analytics, and Help Center features. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (94%). Frontend: All UI features verified and working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - not implemented (not part of new features)

passed_tests: Help Center page (/help) renders with FAQ accordion
Help Center search functionality filters FAQs correctly
Help Center has all 6 category filters (Buying, Selling, Payments, Delivery, Account, Security)
Help Center has WhatsApp contact option (wa.me/447449858053)
Help Center has Email contact option (info@jarnnmarket.com)
Help Center has Phone contact option (+234 818 927 5367)
Help link visible in navbar navigation
Help Center option in user dropdown menu
Admin API endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
Admin API endpoints deny non-admin users (403 for farmers/buyers)
Admin dashboard redirects non-admin users to /dashboard
Admin Panel menu option NOT visible for non-admin users
Seller Analytics API (/api/sellers/me/analytics) returns data for farmers
Seller Analytics API denies buyer users (403)
Analytics tab visible in seller (farmer) dashboard
Analytics tab NOT visible in buyer dashboard
Analytics displays: Total Revenue, Total Sales, Active Listings, Total Views, Total Bids, Seller Rating
action_items: Create admin user accounts (admin@jarnnmarket.com or info@jarnnmarket.com) to fully test Admin Dashboard functionality

Help Center has FAQ accordion with search and category filters.
